title: Chili
ingredients: 1 15oz can chili beans in spicy sauce
instructions:
Ina large soup or pasta pot over medium high heat, cook the ground beef and sausage until browned. Drain the grease.
Add the beans, tomatoes and tomato paste to the meat. Stir in the onion, celery, peppers, bacon bits, bouillon and beer; mix well. Add the chili powder, Worcestershire, garlic, oregano, cumin, hot sauce, basil, salt, pepper, cayenne, paprika and sugar. Stir and cover.
Simmer over low heat for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
Add additional spice to taste. Serve garnished with shredded cheddar cheese.
Serve with corn chips or corn bread.
